text:
There was a boy who had a very large belly. His name was Jimbo.

Jimbo lived a simple, peaceful life. He never had anything remarkable happen, or did he? Once, he made a bet with a friend that he could eat an entire pizza alone.

Jimbo accepted the challenge. He ate it. And then he ate some more. And then he ate even more. The next day, he woke up feeling a little bloated.

His friend laughed, and Jimbo thought maybe there was something to this weird feeling. After a few days, it became apparent that his stomach was growing, and his belly was expanding. He'd never been so full before!

Soon, everyone noticed Jimbo's swelling belly. His classmates whispered and giggled, and his teacher told him he’d need to see a doctor.

That’s when Jimbo realized his mistake. He hadn’t known the limits of his appetite—and he definitely hadn’t anticipated an unexpected trip to the hospital.

The doctor
